sections.label: Lyrics
lines: [Intro]
The temple breathes in morning light
Dust and prayers in quiet flight
Years of waiting in my bones
Promises like ancient stones
[Verse 1]
I walked these halls a thousand days
Watching hope in passing face
Prophets whispered in the wind
Saying, “Soon it will begin.”
Every promise carried far
Like a quiet burning star
But today the sky came near
When I held salvation here
[Pre-Chorus]
Tiny heartbeat in my hands
Yet the weight of heaven stands
All the years of longing seen
In the light of one small King
[Chorus — Main Hook]
Now my eyes have seen the light
Shining through the longest night
All the waiting, all the years
Gathered in these holy tears
Peace can carry me away
I have seen the dawn of day
Hope for every land and tongue
In the promise of this Son
[Verse 2]
Kings may rise and kingdoms fall
Time will echo through it all
But this fragile breath of grace
Holds the future in its face
Not with thunder, not with flame
But a child the world will name
Every sorrow, every scar
Will be healed for who we are
[Pre-Chorus]
Tiny heartbeat in my hands
Yet the weight of heaven stands
Every road the prophets dreamed
Meets the light that now I’ve seen
[Chorus]
Now my eyes have seen the light
Shining through the longest night
All the waiting, all the years
Gathered in these holy tears
Peace can carry me away
I have seen the dawn of day
Hope for every land and tongue
In the promise of this Son
[Bridge]
Let the nations lift their eyes
Let the weary realize
Every promise spoken true
Has begun in something new
Not a throne of gold or might
Just a spark against the night
But the darkness will be gone
When this little heart beats strong
[Final Chorus]
Now my eyes have seen the light
Burning through the darkest night
Every promise now revealed
Every broken heart can heal
I can rest my soul in peace
For the waiting now can cease
All the world will one day see
This small child will set us free
[Outro]
So take me home in quiet grace
I have seen the Savior’s face
